en: Well, I think since I last was on Radio 1, I got to meet Beyonce a couple of times, which.

ko: 첫 번째 만났을 때는 정말 잘 버텼어. 쇼에 초대해줘서 고마워, B.

ko: 그런데 문제는, 그녀의 드레싱룸에 있었고, 우리를 나누는 건 작은 커튼뿐이었어.

en: The thing is, I was in her dressing room, and there was only a little curtain separating.
ko: 그녀가 메이크업을 받는 동안, 나는 '이걸 할 수 있을까?'라고 생각하기 시작했어.

en: Us while she was having her makeup done, and I started going, I don't think I can do this,
ko: 이걸 할 수 있을 것 같지 않아.

en: I don't think I can do this.
ko: 그리고 그녀는 그 모든 걸 들었을 거야.

en: And she would have heard it all.
And then she popped out, so I put on a brave face, but the second time I went out on a.

en: Balcony and got on my hands and knees and cried.
